changeSet.author: fineract
fineract
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE m_appuser MODIFY COLUMN temporary_password_expiry_time datetime(6) NULL DEFAULT NULL;

changeSet.author: fineract
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE m_command MODIFY COLUMN created_at datetime(6) NULL DEFAULT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN updated_at datetime(6) NULL DEFAULT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN executed_at datetime(6) NULL DEFAULT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN approved_at datetime(6) NULL DEFAULT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN rejected_at datetime(6) NULL DEFAULT NULL;

fineract
fineract
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE m_wc_loan_account_locks MODIFY COLUMN lock_placed_on datetime(6) NOT NULL;
